name: three-d-carousel
description: 3D carousel component with perspective effects and smooth item transitions

registry_item.name: three-d-carousel
registry_item.description: 3D carousel component with perspective effects and smooth item transitions

visual_summary: A 3D carousel component with the ability to handle swipe or click navigation between cards, customizable cylinder width and rotation animation speed. Typically used when wanting to display a set of images or content that require interactive and visually appealing navigation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: three-d-carousel
Description: A 3D carousel component with the ability to handle swipe or click navigation between cards, customizable cylinder width and rotation animation speed. Typically used when wanting to display a set of images or content that require interactive and visually appealing navigation.
Style: modern, premium, scroll-free
Interactions: touch, draggable, responsive
Tags: carousel, cards, 3d, swipe, click, navigation, animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

  motion,
  useAnimation,
  useMotionValue,
  useTransform,
} from "motion/react"

export const useIsomorphicLayoutEffect =
  typeof window !== "undefined" ? useLayoutEffect : useEffect

type UseMediaQueryOptions = {
  defaultValue?: boolean
  initializeWithValue?: boolean
}

const IS_SERVER = typeof window === "undefined"

export funct
